title: KeepTrack Plugin Manifest
description: Manifest for a third-party KeepTrack plugin installed via `npm run plugin -- add`.

name.description: kebab-case package name; must equal the install directory name.

repository.description: Repository URL, shown in the in-app Plugin Manager.

engine.description: semver range of compatible KeepTrack host versions, e.g. ">=13.0.0 <14.0.0".

plugins.description: One or more plugin classes contributed by this repo.

configKey.description: Unique key; MUST equal the plugin class's `readonly id`.

entry.description: Repo-relative path to the entry module (explicit extension, POSIX separators).

dependencies.description: configKeys of built-in plugins this plugin needs (used by the dev harness).

localesDir.description: Folder of {lang}.src.json files, keyed under plugins.<configKey>.*. Conventionally "locales".

workers.description: Reserved. Web workers are not supported in format version 1.

runtime.description: Reserved for a future runtime loader (prebuilt ESM bundle). Ignored by the build-time installer.
